mapper.insert:
insert into plant_experiment_detail_tb(id,pd_num,experiment_num, region_num,vector_task_code,seed_num, breed_code,plant_code,generation_code, species_code,plant_time,plant_number, experiment_address_code,plant_unit,remarks, gene_type,create_user_id,create_user_name, create_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.pdNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.experimentNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.breedCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.generationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.experimentAddressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.geneType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.createUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
